title: to V 作主詞／動名詞作主詞

formulas.zh: 不定詞作主詞，後接be動詞和形容詞
動名詞作主詞，後接be動詞和形容詞
虛主詞it，後接形容詞和不定詞，表示真正主詞

explanation: 不定詞或動名詞可作句子主詞，兩者語法功能相同但語態略有差異。不定詞偏向具體單一動作，常用虛主詞it取代以簡化句式；動名詞偏向習慣性或抽象概念，較口語自然。兩種形式在學測中均為常考重點。虛主詞it結構特別常見，能使句子表達更簡潔優雅，避免句首過重。

examples.eng: To learn English is necessary for your future career development.
examples.chi: 學習英文對你的未來職業發展是必要的。

examples.eng: Reading books regularly can improve your knowledge and vocabulary skills.
examples.chi: 定期閱讀書籍可以提升你的知識和詞彙能力。

examples.eng: It is important to protect the environment for future generations.
examples.chi: 保護環境對子孫後代來說很重要。

examples.eng: It is challenging to achieve success without persistence and hard work.
examples.chi: 在沒有堅持和努力的情況下取得成功是有挑戰性的。

extension.tip: 判斷時注意：(1)不定詞To V強調單一具體動作，常與重要性、必要性等詞搭配；(2)動名詞V-ing表習慣或抽象概念，較口語；(3)虛主詞it使句子簡潔優雅，常用於正式書面語。

examples.test: To study abroad is my dream.
examples.result: → 正確。不定詞作主詞，強調具體單一動作（去國外唸書）
→ 正確。動名詞作主詞，同樣可接受，但較口語自然

examples.test: It is my dream to study abroad.
examples.result: → 正確。虛主詞it使主詞後置，句式更優雅簡潔

extension.note: 記憶口訣：『不定詞單一明確，動名詞習慣抽象，虛主詞it最優雅』

parts: is beneficial for developing critical thinking skills.
exercises.sentence: Reading widely is beneficial for developing critical thinking skills.
exercises.translation: 廣泛閱讀對發展批判性思維能力很有益處。

parts: to balance work and family life in modern society.
exercises.sentence: It is challenging to balance work and family life in modern society.
exercises.translation: 在現代社會中平衡工作和家庭生活是有挑戰性的。

parts: English fluently opens many doors for your career opportunities.
exercises.sentence: To speak English fluently opens many doors for your career opportunities.
exercises.translation: 能流暢地說英文為你的職業機會打開許多大門。

parts: to establish good habits when you are young and energetic.
exercises.sentence: It is essential to establish good habits when you are young and energetic.
exercises.translation: 在年輕精力充沛時養成良好習慣是必不可少的。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的句型完成句子，表達學習英文的重要性。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ English is important for international communication.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「To learn」。不定詞或動名詞皆可作主詞，此句強調具體單一動作「學習英文」，用不定詞to learn更自然。C選項「To learning」為文法錯誤，to後接原型動詞；D選項「Learn」為原型動詞，不能直接作主詞；B選項「Learning」雖也可作主詞，但此句用to learn更恰當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 完成句子，表達閱讀書籍是一項習慣性活動帶來的益處。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ books regularly helps develop critical thinking skills.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是C「Reading」。動名詞emphasize習慣性、重複性的動作，「定期閱讀」是一種生活習慣，用動名詞reading更合適。A選項「Read」為原型動詞，不能作主詞；B選項「To read」偏向單一具體動作，不符合此句習慣性用法；D選項「Being read」為被動動名詞，語意不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 改寫句子使其更簡潔，用虛主詞it重新表達。
mc_exercises.question_eng: To balance work and family responsibilities _______ challenging for many professionals.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「is」。不定詞to balance為單數主詞，需用單數動詞is。此句採「To V + is + adjective」結構，不定詞作邏輯主詞，is為連綴動詞。B選項「are」為複數形式不符；C選項「being」為進行式分詞，與主詞搭配不合；D選項「have been」為完成進行式，不符句型結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 完成句子，需判斷虛主詞it結構與動名詞作主詞的差異應用。
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is essential _______ regular exercise to maintain good health, and _______ consistently can significantly reduce disease risk.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「to do / exercising」。第一空用it虛主詞結構「It is essential to do」，不定詞作真正主詞；第二空「exercising consistently」為獨立的動名詞片語作主詞，表習慣性動作。B選項前後顛倒；C選項to doing文法錯誤；D選項do與exercised詞性搭配不當。此題考查虛主詞與動名詞主詞的靈活運用。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 每天早起對我們的健康很重要。
translation_exercises.answer: Getting up early every day is important for our health. / It is important for our health to get up early every day.
key_points: Getting up early / to get up early
hints: 提示1：動名詞作主詞用 V-ing is...; 不定詞作主詞用 It is... to V 結構
提示2：兩種形式均正確，但動名詞作主詞更強調習慣性動作，虛主詞it則使句子更簡潔

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 準時繳交功課是每個學生的責任。
translation_exercises.answer: Submitting homework on time is every student's responsibility. / It is every student's responsibility to submit homework on time.
hints: 提示1：選用動名詞表習慣性要求，或用虛主詞it突顯個別責任
提示2：注意 responsibility 後需用 of / to，此處應為 to submit；或直接用 is...responsibility 後接同位語

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 在網路上與陌生人分享個人資訊是危險且不明智的做法。
translation_exercises.answer: Sharing personal information with strangers online is dangerous and unwise. / It is dangerous and unwise to share personal information with strangers online.
hints: 提示1：動名詞強調此類行為普遍性風險；虛主詞it則凸顯具體情境下的不智
提示2：避免用 It is dangerous to sharing... 的混雜形式；兩個形容詞並列時需用 and 連接

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學習如何有效管理時間和壓力對高中生來說至關重要，這將直接影響他們的學業成績和心理健康。
translation_exercises.answer: Learning how to manage time and stress effectively is crucial for high school students, which will directly affect their academic performance and mental health. / It is crucial for high school students to learn how to manage time and stress effectively, which will directly affect their academic performance and mental health.
hints: 提示1：動名詞作主詞突顯學習本身的重要性與習慣價值；虛主詞it則強調對學生群體的特定要求；後句用關係代名詞which補充說明影響
提示2：注意 how to 後接原形動詞；avoid 改為 manage；兩個受影響對象用 and 並列時應避免過度複雜，可考慮用分號或 dash 改善可讀性
